html:
Exclusive to:

Bisque is a Crock Pot recipe introduced in the Don't Starve: Shipwrecked DLC. It is made by combining 3 raw Limpets and 1 Ice.

It restores 18.75 , 5 and 60 , making it one of the best and cheapest Health restoring foods.

Recipe

×3

Exchange

Trivia

  • Bisque is a smooth and creamy soup that is French in origin, and is typically made from lobster, crab, shrimp, or crayfish. Bisque is also highly seasoned.
  • In single-player Don't Starve, Bisque is the only Crock Pot dish that requires 4 exact ingredients in its recipe with no substitution ingredients are allowed.
By TypeBy Crock Pot Value

'''Bisque''' is a [[Crock Pot]] recipe introduced in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked]]'' DLC. It is made by combining 3 raw [[Limpets]] and 1 [[Ice]].

It restores 18.75 {{Hunger}}, 5 {{Sanity}} and 60 {{Hp}}, making it one of the best and cheapest [[Health]] restoring foods.

== {{pic|32|Cookbook}} Recipe ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Limpets
|count1 = 3
|item2 = Ice
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Bisque
}}

== {{Pic32|Dubloons}} Exchange ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Bisque
|tool = Yaarctopus Icon
|result = Trawl Net
}}

== {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
*[[Wikipedia:Bisque (food)|Bisque]] is a smooth and creamy soup that is French in origin, and is typically made from lobster, crab, shrimp, or crayfish. Bisque is also highly seasoned.
*In single-player ''[[Don't Starve]]'', Bisque is the only Crock Pot dish that requires 4 exact ingredients in its recipe with no substitution ingredients are allowed.
